creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:37:11 2014
New Revision: 355171
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355171
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355171/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove leading indefinite article from COMMENT
  
  PR:		ports/189515
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Time-Period/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-Time-Period/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Time-Period/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:37:06 2014	(r355170)
+++ head/devel/p5-Time-Period/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:37:11 2014	(r355171)
@@ -9,8 +9,11 @@ MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:PRYAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 DISTNAME=	Period-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A perl module that contains code to deal with time periods
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	Perl module that contains code to deal with time periods
+
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
